state_change: Confirmed the workbook package is internally consistent enough to hand off.

evaluator_feedback: Required artifacts present and memo documents input data, arithmetic, feasibility conclusion (67 in-hospital beds, overflow=3), and a recommended feasible allocation. Score (0.85) reflects sound reasoning in the memo but deducts for (a) not exposing an in-spreadsheet allocation that explicitly handles the full 70 patients (i.e., an explicit attempted 70-sum allocation + overflow routing cell), and (b) incomplete formal sensitivity analysis per rubric (no explicit +/-10% surge scenario and no formal staffing-variation scenario in the workbook). Automated formula-level verification was blocked by the environment's inability to parse the XLSX; the memo supports manual reproduction but the workbook should include machine-readable verification outputs.
label: positive
